description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU Documentation that runs on pull requests and pushes to the main branch, and can be manually triggered. The workflow should only run if the repository owner is pytorch. It uses a linux.2xlarge job with write permission to repository contents, running in an amazonlinux:2023 container. The workflow sets up a build environment, checks out the repository, and performs various setup and installation steps for building and deploying FBGEMM_GPU documentation to the gh-pages branch.
